title: QAT OLE
description: Quantum Advantage Tracker Operator Loschmidt Echo (OLE) benchmark. Loads an OLE circuit and estimates the Pauli-Z product expectation value ⟨Z_{q_0} ... Z_{q_k}⟩.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'QAT OLE' for this schema.

circuit.description: Named QAT OLE circuit to fetch from the Quantum Advantage Tracker repository. Mutually exclusive with qasm_path. Uses the known observable qubits [52, 59, 72] for all named circuits.

qasm_path.description: Path to a local OpenQASM 3.0 circuit file, resolved relative to the current working directory. Mutually exclusive with circuit. Requires observable_qubits.

observable_qubits.description: Qubit indices to measure for the Pauli-Z product observable. Required when using qasm_path. Ignored when using circuit (the QAT observable [52, 59, 72] is used instead).

num_initial_states.description: Number of randomly sampled computational-basis initial states to average over (N_init in the QAT OLE protocol). The device executes one circuit per initial state.

seed.description: Optional random seed for sampling the initial states, for reproducibility.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit execution.

oneOf.description: Named QAT circuit fetched from the Quantum Advantage Tracker.
Local QASM file with explicit observable qubits.
